name_cn:
🎉New Carry Bag🎉🎉🎉
This handbag incorporates a dynamic sense of beauty into every detail of daily use with its fashionable and exquisite design. The spacious body is made of imported cowhide and features a detachable, adjustable leather shoulder strap. The magnetic closure has a unique retro style. It looks very fashionable and lightweight. Ladies, get yours now🎉🎉
Model: 1BA496
Dimensions: 19x21x7cm
